pub fn adaptive_sort<T: Ord + Clone>(a: &mut [T]) {
    let n = a.len();
    if n < 2 { return }
    let (mut s, mut r) = (true, true);
    for i in 1..n {
        if a[i-1] > a[i] { s = false } else if a[i-1] < a[i] { r = false }
        if !s && !r { break }
    }
    if s { return }
    if r { a.reverse(); return }
    qsort(a);
}

fn qsort<T: Ord + Clone>(mut a: &mut [T]) {
    while a.len() > 24 {
        let (n, m, l) = (a.len(), a.len() / 2, a.len() - 1);
        if a[0] > a[m] { a.swap(0, m) }
        if a[0] > a[l] { a.swap(0, l) }
        if a[m] > a[l] { a.swap(m, l) }
        let p = a[m].clone();
        let (mut lt, mut gt, mut i) = ((a[0] < p) as usize, n - (a[l] > p) as usize, 1);
        while i < gt {
            if a[i] < p { a.swap(lt, i); lt += 1; i += 1 }
            else if a[i] > p { gt -= 1; a.swap(i, gt) }
            else { i += 1 }
        }
        let (left, rest) = a.split_at_mut(lt);
        let right = &mut rest[gt - lt..];
        if left.len() < right.len() { qsort(left); a = right; } else { qsort(right); a = left; }
    }
    for i in 1..a.len() {
        if a[i] < a[i-1] {
            let (v, mut j) = (a[i].clone(), i);
            while j > 0 && a[j-1] > v { a[j] = a[j-1].clone(); j -= 1 }
            a[j] = v;
        }
    }
}
